title: Squawk Box Europe
desc: The host invites prominent personalities and analysts to share their valuable insights on the latest developments in the fields of business and finance and also answer questions asked by viewers.

title: NSE Closing Bell
desc: The host presents the status of the different stocks of the National Stock Exchange (NSE) at the time of the closing bell.

title: Markets Forward
desc: Experts analyse and discuss forward markets, the over-the-counter financial markets that are essential for contracts for future delivery.

title: US Squawk Box
desc: Experts provide pre-market updates that are useful for investors and professional traders and discuss various important developments in the world of stock markets.

title: Squawk on the Street
desc: The host presents the most significant updates and developments from the first 90 minutes of trading in the US stock market.

title: Global Lens
desc: The presenter provides information on the top news headlines and developments surrounding various issues from across the globe.

title: Money Movers
desc: A comprehensive and detailed coverage of the latest stock market developments, with insights into the latest business news.

title: Half Time Report
desc: Financial experts and analysts shed light on latest news and updates pertaining to the economy, stock markets, real estate, media and technology.

title: The Exchange
desc: The host presents the latest financial and economic news updates and headlines that impact the economy from around the world.

title: Power Lunch
desc: The hosts converse with business and political experts about the stock markets to provide information on trading and investing.

desc: The host invites a renowned industry expert to discuss the trending and most talked-about market developments and investors' reactions to them.

desc: The host presents a fast-paced chat with four Wall Street traders, exploring stock market strategies, investment tips and market trends.

desc: The host delivers the latest news updates and key developments concerning global market data, stock markets and the world economy.
